subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou be blessed through the grace of the All-Merciful and be so eloquent in His remembrance that the fragrant breezes of mention shall awaken the heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت رحمن فائز باشی و بذکرش ناطق بشانیکه نفحات ذکر ناس غافل را
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
